name: Cernion Energy Sidecar
description: Expose Cernion Energy Sidecar tools to OpenClaw through separated evidence and process boundaries.

baseUrl.description: Cernion base URL, for example https://cernion.example

bearerToken.description: Read-only Cernion bearer token. Prefer the OpenClaw secret store.

bearerTokenEnv.description: Environment variable name that contains the bearer token.

bearerTokenFile.description: Path to a local 0600 file containing the read-only bearer token.

processBearerToken.description: Cernion process-intake bearer token. Keep separate from the read-only token.

processBearerTokenEnv.description: Environment variable name that contains the process-intake bearer token.

processBearerTokenFile.description: Path to a local 0600 file containing the process-intake bearer token.

allowRestProxy.description: Allow read-only REST execution plans emitted by Cernion to be proxied through this sidecar.

baseUrl.label: Cernion Base URL
baseUrl.help: Base URL of the Cernion provider that exposes /api/agent-sidecar.

bearerToken.label: Cernion Read-Only Token
bearerToken.help: Read-only Cernion Sidecar token. Store as an OpenClaw secret.

bearerTokenEnv.label: Bearer Token Env Var
bearerTokenEnv.help: Optional environment variable name for the read-only token.

bearerTokenFile.label: Bearer Token File
bearerTokenFile.help: Optional local file containing the read-only token. Prefer mode 0600.

processBearerToken.label: Cernion Process Token
processBearerToken.help: Separate token for Process Intake. Required only for cernion_prepare_process_intent.

processBearerTokenEnv.label: Process Token Env Var
processBearerTokenEnv.help: Optional environment variable name for the process-intake token.

processBearerTokenFile.label: Process Token File
processBearerTokenFile.help: Optional local file containing the process-intake token. Prefer mode 0600.
